releaseContents: Settings navigation, logout confirmation, persisted slow mode, live topic ordering, and removal of manual refresh controls.
ARIA-compatible drawer dialog containers and regression coverage.
Selectable test suites and five GitHub Actions jobs including HTTP smoke.
Architecture, security, QA, web-quality, and Cloudflare migration documentation.

preDeployChecks.qa: passed: 172 deterministic tests and 12 smoke tests
preDeployChecks.secretScan: no credential patterns found in files committed
preDeployChecks.formatCheck: not clean: 113 files in pre-existing repository-wide Prettier debt; no bulk formatting was applied

postDeployVerification.authentication: configured with Google; all safe preflight checks true
postDeployVerification.bootstrap: 200 guest payload, secure HttpOnly cookie, no session ID in response body, slowMode exposed
postDeployVerification.browser: mobile drawer dialog, focus return, topic navigation, dynamic title, and zero console errors passed

metrics.assessment: No stop condition observed. CPU remained low and no error logs appeared.

rollback.databaseCompatibility: The migration only adds slow_mode with a default; the previous code ignores the extra column.
rollback.dataRecovery: Use the logical SQLite backup before considering a Render disk snapshot restore.

unresolvedRisks: The security report still records a production privacy finding for hidden profile fields and pending avatar URLs.
Avatar CDN retention and account-deletion step-up authentication remain open follow-up items.
Repository-wide Prettier debt remains intentionally separate from this release.
